# Ahmed Chioua — Scrum Master & Agile Expert

> Certified Scrum Master (PSM I · SAFe® 6 SM · SAFe® 6 Agilist) with 5+ years of dedicated
> Scrum Master experience and a 9-year background in software engineering. Remote-first,
> based in Tetouan, Morocco (GMT+1). Available for Scrum Master and Agile Coach engagements globally.

## Identity

- **Full name**: Ahmed Chioua
- **Role**: Scrum Master / Agile Expert
- **Location**: Tetouan, Morocco · Remote (GMT+1)
- **Email**: ahmedchioua@gmail.com

- **Book a call**: https://calendly.com/ahmedchioua/30min

## Professional Summary

Certified Scrum Master with 5+ years of dedicated Scrum Master experience and a 9-year background
in software engineering. Proven track record facilitating agile delivery for distributed product
engineering teams across telecom, automotive, life sciences, and retail.

Servant leader who protects the process, removes blockers, and coaches teams to mature their
practices — balancing process adherence with pragmatic, outcome-focused delivery. Deep working
knowledge of Scrum, Kanban, and SAFe; fluent in Jira, Confluence, and Azure DevOps; comfortable
partnering with product managers to keep backlogs healthy and prioritized.

## Certifications

- Professional Scrum Master I (PSM I) — Scrum.org
- SAFe® 6 Scrum Master (SSM) — Scaled Agile, Inc.
- SAFe® 6 Agilist — Scaled Agile, Inc.

## Work Experience

### Scrum Master — Bell.ca (via consulting engagement) · Jun 2024 – Present
Remote – Morocco | Project: Service Assurance (large-scale telecom platform)
- Facilitate daily standups, sprint planning, sprint reviews, and retrospectives for a fully distributed team
- Remove impediments and escalate blockers; protect the team from scope creep
- Track velocity, sprint burndown, and delivery health metrics; coach on continuous improvement
- Partner with PMs and POs on backlog refinement and prioritization
- Coordinate cross-team dependencies in a scaled agile environment
- Tools: Jira · Confluence · Miro · Scrum · SAFe · Kanban

### Scrum Master — NTT DATA · Oct 2023 – Jun 2024
Remote – Tetouan, Morocco | Client: Bayer | Project: CS Regulatory (life sciences IT)
- Facilitated all Scrum ceremonies for a distributed team across multiple time zones
- Resolved cross-team dependencies; coached on definition of done and refinement cadence
- Reported sprint metrics and delivery health; flagged risks early
- Tools: Azure DevOps Boards · OneNote · Scrum · Kanban

### Scrum Master — NTT DATA · Jun 2021 – Dec 2023
Remote – Tetouan, Morocco | Client: BMW | Projects: On-Demand Mobility Carsharing & BMW Tele-Services
- Served as Scrum Master for multiple cloud-native product engineering teams in a scaled agile setup
- Ran focused retrospectives; coached teams on story slicing and improving flow
- Partnered with POs on backlog refinement and release planning across multi-team programs
- Mediated conflicts; built psychological safety in a distributed, multicultural environment
- Coordinated with Scrum Masters and RTEs on dependencies and PI planning
- Tools: Jira · Confluence · Miro · Scrum · SAFe · Kanban

### DevOps Engineer — NTT DATA · Jan 2021 – Jun 2021
Tetouan, Morocco | Client: BMW | Project: On-Demand Mobility Carsharing Platform
- Built CI/CD pipelines and observability tooling before transitioning to Scrum Master role
- Stack: Java EE · Docker · Kubernetes · GitLab CI/CD · AWS · Grafana · Prometheus · Kibana

### Software Engineer — Harman Connected Services · Jun 2019 – Jan 2021
Casablanca, Morocco | Client: Maincare Solutions | Project: Health Management Apps
- Delivered features within Scrum cycles; built developer-side perspective informing SM practice
- Stack: Spring Boot · Java EE · Node.js · TypeScript · Angular · iOS/Swift 5 · SQL · Jenkins

### Software Engineer — Harman Connected Services · Sep 2017 – Jun 2019
Casablanca, Morocco | Client: Symphony Retail AI | Project: ERP G.O.L.D V5/V6
- Delivered ERP capabilities to enterprise retail clients (Disney, Carrefour, Casino, Fnac)
- Stack: Java/JEE · Oracle 11g · JavaScript · REST APIs · PL/SQL · SonarQube

**Agile & Scrum**: Scrum · Kanban · SAFe · PI Planning · Backlog Refinement · Story Sizing ·
Velocity Tracking · Sprint Metrics · Release Planning · Definition of Done/Ready · Continuous Improvement

Stakeholder Communication · Servant Leadership · Coaching & Mentoring

SQL · Docker · Kubernetes · GitLab CI/CD · AWS
